mapper.select: SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, q.member_no AS memberNo, q.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.answer_member_no AS answerMemberNo, q.status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate, c.cate_name AS cateName, m.name AS name FROM qna q JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY q.qna_no DESC

SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, q.member_no AS memberNo, q.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.answer_member_no AS answerMemberNo, q.status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate,
c.cate_name AS cateName, p.cate_name AS parentCateName,
m.name
FROM qna q
JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no
JOIN cs_category p ON c.parent_no = p.cs_cate_no
JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no
WHERE c.parent_no = #{parentNo}
ORDER BY q.qna_no DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, q.member_no AS memberNo, q.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.answer_member_no AS answerMemberNo, q.status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate,
c.cate_name AS cateName, p.cate_name AS parentCateName,
m.name
FROM qna q
JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no
JOIN cs_category p ON c.parent_no = p.cs_cate_no
JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no
WHERE q.qna_no = #{qnaNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna(member_no, cs_cate_no, title, content, answer, answer_member_no, status, reg_date, answer_date) VALUES(#{memberNo}, #{csCateNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{answerMemberNo}, COALESCE(#{status}, '검토중'), NOW(), #{answerDate})
